title: The Forgotten Temple of Aelara
description: The protagonist discovers an ancient temple in a dense jungle. Tests spatial navigation, environment description, object discovery, and NPC encounters.
setting: A dense tropical jungle on an unnamed island. The protagonist is an archaeologist who has been searching for the Temple of Aelara for years.

protagonist.name: Dr. Kael
protagonist.description: A seasoned archaeologist in their 40s, wearing a weathered leather jacket and carrying a journal.

turns.user_input: Look around the clearing and check my compass
Follow the river upstream, keeping an eye out for any ruins
Examine the strange stone I just noticed near the riverbank
Pick up the stone and put it in my bag
Keep moving upstream through the jungle
Stop and listen. What do I hear?
Move toward the sound of running water
I've reached a waterfall. Look behind it
Enter the cave behind the waterfall
Turn on my flashlight and explore the cave
What's on the cave walls? Examine them closely
Write down the symbols in my journal
Continue deeper into the cave
I hear footsteps. Hide behind a rock and wait
Try to see who it is without being spotted
Step out and introduce myself to the stranger
Ask them if they know anything about the Temple of Aelara
Show them the stone I found by the river
Ask if I can travel with them
Follow my new companion deeper into the cave system
We've reached a fork. Check my compass and ask my companion which way
Take the left path
The passage is getting narrow. Squeeze through
I see light ahead. Move toward it
We've emerged into an underground chamber. Describe what I see
Approach the central structure in the chamber
Look for any inscriptions or markings on it
Compare these markings with the ones I drew in my journal earlier
Try placing the stone from the river onto the structure
What happened when I placed the stone? Look around
Walk through the newly opened passage
Check on my companion. Are they still with me?
We enter what looks like the actual temple. Examine the main hall
Look at the statues lining the walls. How many are there?
Approach the largest statue at the far end
Is there anything at the base of the statue?
Pick up the artifact I found
Show the artifact to my companion and ask what they think
Take out my journal and document everything in this room
Check my inventory. What am I carrying now?
Notice something moving in the shadows. Investigate
Try to communicate with whatever is there
Back away slowly and rejoin my companion
Suggest we explore the side chambers before leaving
Enter the first side chamber on the left
Search this room thoroughly
Take anything useful and move to the next chamber
This chamber has water. Fill my canteen
Head back to the main hall and look for an exit
Lead the way out of the temple. What do we find outside?
